messages.text: Basket 1: a mouse-shaped wicker basket with a rounded body and a pointed snout—like a little rodent basket.
Basket 2: a deep round bucket basket with a thick dark handle—like a simple brown pail basket. Confirm when you’ve placed it.
Is it the darker round bucket with a smooth thick handle rather than the lighter one with the patterned rim?
Basket 2: yes—the darker deep bucket with the thick smooth dark handle, not the lighter one with the patterned rim.
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic basket with a lid flipped open and a tall center handle—call it an open picnic basket. Confirm when you place it.

rounded body with a pointed snout
small bead-like eye and ear on top
